Description.value: I first clear the counter by picking up the cup and placing it into the sink. I then pick up the sponge and use it to wipe the counter surface clean. Finally, I return the sponge to the sink to complete the task.

Need.value: I need to remove the cup from the counter so the surface is free of obstacles before I clean it.

Description.value: I pick up the cup from the counter and place it into the sink.

Need.value: I need to locate the cup on the counter so I can plan how to pick it up.
I need to pick up the cup so I can move it off the counter and into the sink.
I need to move to the sink while holding the cup so I can place it inside.

Step.name: place the cup into the sink

Need.value: I need to move the cup into the sink so it can be cleaned later.
I need to obtain the sponge so I have a tool to wipe the counter surface with.

Description.value: I navigate to the sink, locate the sponge, and pick it up so I can carry it to the counter.

Need.value: I need to move to the sink so I can reach the sponge that is stored near it.
I need to find the exact position of the sponge so I can grasp it accurately.
I need to pick up the sponge so I can use it to wipe the counter.
I need to clean the counter surface so it is free of residue and debris.

Description.value: I navigate to the kitchen counter with the sponge and wipe the surface until it is clean.

Need.value: I need to move to the counter while holding the sponge so I can begin wiping.
I need to position the sponge against the counter so I can wipe effectively.
I need to move the sponge across the counter so any residue and debris are removed.
I need to verify that the counter is clean before returning the sponge.
I need to return the sponge to the sink so it does not remain on the counter and the task is fully complete.

Description.value: I navigate to the sink, place the sponge inside, and release it to complete the task.

Need.value: I need to move back to the sink while holding the sponge so I can place it inside.

Step.name: place the sponge in the sink

Need.value: I need to place the sponge into the sink so it is properly stored and the counter remains clear.
I need to confirm that both the cup and the sponge are in the sink and the counter is clean so I can mark the task as complete.
